source.body_text_sample:
Skip to Content
Clinic Hours
Services
Health Info
About
Job Opportunities
We need physicians!

Part-time positions for provincially licensed physicians available in a busy urban clinic specializing in men’s sexual health testing, diagnosis and treatment. Day, evening and weekend clinics available.

We are a well established, community based organization with a diverse client base from across southern Ontario. A large proportion of our patients are gay men.

Working in a multi-disciplinary team with RNs, clinicians and counsellors, your primary function would be to provide comprehensive testing and treatment for sexually transmitted infections. Training and shadowing opportunities are available with experienced doctors if required.

Familiarity with HIV testing and counselling is an asset. Modern facilities, friendly working environment and good remuneration!

Please mail your résumé to:

Hassle Free Clinic
66 Gerrard Street East
2nd Floor
Toronto ON M5A 1G3

Or 
Fax: 416 · 922 · 2018
Attn: Job Opportunities
